sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114721" key="xristh/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρισ-τήριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n114721.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unguent, a bottle of ointments,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
